title: dactylorhiza comosa subsp. occidentalis
intro: Dactylorhiza comosa subsp. occidentalis is a sub-species of the orchid plant, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza comosa subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
